query: 1. check the tool definition for context_briefing... it requires a task description (should represent a 1 sentence description of what the agent is supposed to do).  Questions: 1. I was trying to decide about specification... but its literally taking scope and risk-Scope document and creating a specification.  I cannot decide whether it requires a knowlege search. Open to input. risk strategist (I think reads the documentation already.  If it only focuses on documents created for the feature, reading the MD's is fine. unisynthesizer - very focused scope.  don't think it applies. 2. context_briefing becomes mandatory, and the other search tools are encouraged but optional.  3. Lookup the context_briefing doc.. I don't believe session_id is a parameter sent. 4. absolutely.  the researcher AND dev in bugfix mode.

entries.title: ADR-002: BriefingService Delegates to SearchService for Semantic Search
ADR-002 col-025: synthesize_from_session Returns current_goal Directly
ADR-004 crt-018b: EffectivenessStateHandle as Non-Optional Constructor Parameter on BriefingService
ADR-005: Briefing Graceful Degradation on Embed Not Ready
ToolSearch must complete before any context_get or dependent MCP tool calls in discovery phase
